description: Interactive issue creation for JWT authentication feature

messages.content: I want to add JWT authentication to the API

I can help you create an issue for that. Let me ask a few questions to flesh out the details.

What's the context? Why does the API need JWT authentication now?
The API currently has no auth at all. We need JWT so the frontend can make authenticated requests.
Got it. What does 'done' look like for this? What are the specific acceptance criteria?
Users should be able to register and get a token, login and get a token, and invalid tokens should be rejected with 401
Are there any constraints on how this should be implemented? For example, specific libraries, algorithms, or things to avoid?
Use argon2 for password hashing. Don't touch the User schema if possible.

expected_issue.title: Add JWT authentication to the API
expected_issue.context: The API currently has no authentication mechanism. We need JWT-based auth so the frontend can make authenticated requests to protected endpoints.
acceptance_criteria: POST /auth/register accepts email+password, returns 201 with JWT token
POST /auth/login verifies credentials and returns 200 with JWT
